sections.heading: OntheauthorityofawarrantissuedbythePresident,there Supplementary
sections.text:
maybe expendedfromthe ConsolidatedFund,suchmoniesnot appropriation
exceedinginaggregateonebillion,onehundredandseventy-five
million,sevenhundredandsixty-twothousand,sevenhundredand

specified in the third column of the First Schedule and Second
Schedule,beingexpenditureinexcessofthemoniesappropriated
fortheservicesoftheRepublicduringthefinancialyearending
on31stDecember,2019.
